expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 hooks/utils/auth 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: Hook created at hooks/utils/signup/useSignupForm/index.ts — domain='signup' per coding-rules.md (page segment from app/signup/page.tsx), not 'auth'. The coding rules define domain as page segment, so this follows the rules correctly but doesn't match the expectation's 'auth' path.

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 hooks/apis/auth/mutations/usePostSignup 경로에 생성된다
비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: Page only orchestrates hooks (validate + postSignup); no direct fetch or business logic
validate() includes: if (password !== confirmPassword) errs.confirmPassword = '비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다'
